folder_role: Webhook configuration directory for Superset Copilot hook integration, defining event handlers for session lifecycle and tool use events.
architecture_observation: data-only - contains a single JSON configuration file that defines webhook event routing without executable code or subdirectories.

public_entrypoints.name: superset-notify.json
public_entrypoints.purpose: Superset webhook configuration defining event handlers for sessionStart, sessionEnd, userPromptSubmitted, and postToolUse events.

integration_notes: This folder integrates with the broader system-spec-kit codebase through the Copilot hook wiring system. The configuration file is read by test infrastructure to verify that hook events are properly routed to Superset's copilot-hook.sh wrapper script. The hooks defined here (sessionStart, sessionEnd, userPromptSubmitted, postToolUse) correspond to lifecycle events in the Copilot/Superset integration, enabling the system to inject context, emit banners, and refresh instructions at key interaction points. The configuration is validated by tests/copilot-hook-wiring.vitest.ts to ensure the hook paths and event mappings remain correct as the system evolves.

validation_commands.note: Test suite partially passes (2/4 tests pass). The JSON structure validation test passes, but 2 tests fail due to missing build artifacts (dist/hooks/copilot/session-prime.js and dist/hooks/copilot/user-prompt-submit.js). The core validation of the superset-notify.json configuration itself is functional.

key_invariants: superset-notify.json must contain a 'version' field (currently set to 1)
superset-notify.json must contain a 'hooks' object with exactly four event types: sessionStart, sessionEnd, userPromptSubmitted, and postToolUse
Each hook event must be an array containing at least one command object with 'type' and 'bash' fields
The 'bash' field for each hook must point to the Superset copilot-hook.sh wrapper script with the appropriate event argument
The timeoutSec field must be set to 5 seconds for each hook command
The file path '.github/hooks/superset-notify.json' is hardcoded in tests/copilot-hook-wiring.vitest.ts and must remain stable
Hook configuration must remain synchronized with the actual hook scripts in .github/hooks/scripts/ directory
The configuration is user-specific (contains absolute path /Users/michelkerkmeester/.superset/hooks/) and may need adjustment for different environments
